title: BEM-863 curator Claude mechanism
objective: Inspect and repair mechanism for routing internal auditor Claude tasks through Curator. Required: create executable/registry files if missing. Route must be GPT -> governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator -> Curator dispatch -> Claude audit task -> governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude -> GPT polling. Create tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/curator_claude_dispatch.py that reads governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_REQUEST_FOR_CURATOR.md, creates governance/tasks/pending/CLAUDE_INTERNAL_AUDIT_BEM859.md, and ensures governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md exists. Wire curator_claude_dispatch.py into tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay_watch.py loop before mailbox_poll.py if safe. Create governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM863_CURATOR_CLAUDE_ROUTE.md with ACTIVE status. Update AGENT_CONTEXT.md note. No issue comments.
